trans-unit.source: Continue to the biomedical registry and research workspace.
Use the administrator account configured for this environment.
No passages linked to this biomodel.
Preclinical biomodels derived from tumor samples
Biomedical research data management platform. Navigate through your registry, biomodels, and passage data.
View and manage patient records and demographics.
Track tumor samples, diagnoses, and biobank codes.
Manage serum, buffy coat, and plasma samples.
Preclinical biomodels derived from tumor samples.
Track biomodel passages and detailed outcomes.
Track biomodel passages, viability, and growth indices
Use Add Passage above or create one from a biomodel detail page.
No tumor samples linked to this patient.
Add your first patient to get started.
Serum, buffy coat, and plasma samples from tumors
No biomodels linked to this tumor.
No samples linked to this tumor.
No genomic sequencing data linked to this tumor.
No molecular data linked to this tumor.
Track tumor samples, classifications, and biobank codes
